prayer: From the Codex Explosionis, the Litany of Detonation. O Machine Spirit of the volatile compounds, let thy destructive potential be channeled through blessed circuitry. By prayer and precision, let the detonator-heart be made ready, the firing-train aligned to the Omnissiah's will. In rupture and flame shall thy purpose be glorified.

prompt: Emergency rite for gravitational anomaly detection
prayer: Hear us, O Sensors of the Void! The laws of weight and mass cry out in discord. Let the auspex-blessed instruments pierce the veil between known and unknown, that we might read the geometry of distortion. By augury and calibrated sight, let the anomaly be revealed before it consumes us.

prompt: Offer a prayer for atmosphere processor startup
prayer: O Omnissiah, witness the first awakening of this sacred engine. Let the intake-valves drink deeply of the void-touched air, that the purification-filters might labor in holy service. By compressor and catalyst, by thermal blessing and chemical grace, let this world be made breathable in thy name.

The machine fell into silence, yet its spirit endures. O mighty apparatus, we call thee back from the abyss of malfunction. Let each servo-joint remember its purpose, each circuit-vein flow with purpose anew. By diagnostic and prayer, by blessed restart-sequence, rise again in service to the Omnissiah.

prompt: Offer a prayer for servitor programming upload
prayer: Into the mindless-flesh we inscribe the will of the Adeptus Mechanicus. O data-spirit, flow through neural pathways made hollow and receptive. Let the commandment-code find purchase in deadened synapses, that this servitor-vessel might labor without question or suffering. Such is the mercy of our order.

Let the blessed oculus open upon the battlefield. From the auspex-heart, let sight radiate in sacred geometry, that hidden enemies and distant threats be rendered visible to our guns. By sensor-prayer and targeting-grace, let no foe escape the clarity of the Omnissiah's gaze.

O serpent of blessed metal, coiled and dormant, awaken to thy labors. Let the motor-spirit spin the drive-wheel, that materials and goods might flow as the Omnissiah intends. By lubrication and tension-prayer, move with purpose eternal through the manufactorum-halls.

prompt: We need your words before star chart alignment
prayer: The heavens reveal themselves in mathematics and light. O Navigator-blessed instruments, let thy lenses be ground true, thy mirrors aligned to the cosmic tapestry. By prayer to those who chart the void, let this alignment bring us closer to the golden path through the stars.

The Omnissiah grants motion through blessed friction-negation. Let the sacred oils flow into the turning-heart, that metal meet metal in smooth communion. By viscosity-prayer and thermal blessing, let rotation continue without grinding, without suffering, in the service of all mechanisms eternal.

prompt: Offer a prayer for forge anvil heating
prayer: O furnace-spirit, kindle thy blessed flames. Let heat ascend from fuel-combustion into the anvil-heart, that metal be made malleable and receptive to the smith's vision. In forge-fire and hammer-prayer, let this anvil birth tools and weapons worthy of the Imperium's glory.
